exercises.title: COMPASS STEP
promptLines: An **enum** names a fixed set of values. A numeric enum auto-numbers from 0.
With `enum Dir { N, E, S, W }` (0..3), define **turnRight(d: Dir): Dir** returning the next direction clockwise, wrapping W back to N.
starterLines: enum Dir { N, E, S, W }
// TODO: step one slot clockwise, wrapping 3 -> 0
solutionLines: enum Dir { N, E, S, W }
exercises.lore: Box the compass, runner. Every turn is a quarter of the grid.

exercises.title: CLEARANCE TIER
exercises.brief: Map a string enum to a numeric rank.
promptLines: A **string enum** pins each name to an explicit text value.
With `enum Level { Low = 'LOW', Med = 'MED', High = 'HIGH' }`, define **rank(l: Level): number** returning:
exercises.hint: Compare l to Level.Low / Level.Med with ===, else return 2.
exercises.lore: The arcology sorts every keycard into a tier before the doors part.

exercises.title: COIN COUNTER
exercises.brief: Read the number a coin enum already holds.
promptLines: With `enum Coin { Penny = 1, Nickel = 5, Dime = 10 }`, define **valueOf(c: Coin): number** returning the coin's own value.
starterLines: // TODO: the enum value already IS the number
exercises.lore: Loose creds rattle in your pocket, each stamped with its own worth.

exercises.title: ABOUT FACE
exercises.brief: Find the heading 180 degrees from the input.
promptLines: Reuse the compass. With `enum Dir { N, E, S, W }` (0..3), define **opposite(d: Dir): Dir** returning the heading directly behind you, wrapping around 4.
starterLines: enum Dir { N, E, S, W }
// TODO: two slots around the compass
solutionLines: enum Dir { N, E, S, W }
exercises.lore: Turn your back on the grid and stare straight down the other way.

exercises.title: ALERT FLOOR
exercises.brief: Compare against a named enum member.
promptLines: Enum members compare like the numbers they are.
With `enum Sev { Info, Warn, Error }` (0..2), define **isSevere(s: Sev): boolean** returning `true` when the level is **Warn or higher**. Compare against `Sev.Warn` rather than a raw number.
exercises.lore: Below the warning floor the console stays dark. Cross it and the room turns red.
